findings.title: No unit tests for mergeEvalChanges, reducer eval actions, or UI components
findings.issue: Tasks.md specifies comprehensive test plans (T-003, T-004, T-006, T-009) with 90-95% coverage targets. Zero test files exist for the new code.
findings.suggestion: Write test files as specified in tasks.md. mergeEvalChanges is pure and trivially testable.
findings.impact: Core merge logic has no automated verification. Regressions would silently corrupt user eval data.

findings.title: LLM eval change validation doesn't check expected_output field
findings.issue: Validation checks name, prompt, assertions but not expected_output (required by EvalCase type). LLM may omit it.
findings.suggestion: Normalize expected_output to empty string if not a string. FIXED: Added normalization.
findings.impact: Eval changes without expected_output pass validation but fail on save.

findings.title: LLM eval changes may lack files array
findings.issue: EvalCase requires files: string[]. LLM may omit it, causing undefined propagation.
findings.suggestion: Normalize files to empty array if not present. FIXED: Added normalization in both server validation and client merge.
findings.impact: Missing files field could cause rendering errors or save failures.
